summary: Full backend+frontend E2E testing of RivalEdge Ventures BFSI site. All 17 backend pytest tests pass (100%). Health, Contact CRUD (+persistence via admin GET), Applications multipart (+.pdf accept, .exe reject, >5MB reject, missing/blank field 400), Admin JWT login (401 wrong / 200 right), Admin protected routes (401 without token, 200 with), Excel export (correct MIME + attachment header). Frontend loads landing with kinetic hero, About/Privacy/Terms routes render, Contact + Apply forms submit successfully and show inline success confirmations, and admin login -> dashboard shows Applications+Contacts tabs with test data, Excel export triggers real .xlsx download. Wrong admin credentials show 'Invalid' error and stay on /admin/login.

minor.issue: Default pytest.ini enables xdist with LoadScope; parallel workers can split contact-create and admin-contact-verify tests causing false negative on first run. Passing serially is 17/17 green. Not an app bug — but consider marking cross-class dependencies or grouping them in a single class.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: applications endpoint's file-size check reads full body into memory before size check — OK at 5MB cap but consider streaming for larger caps.
server.py: allowed_ext for resume includes .pdf/.doc/.docx/.rtf — the review request mentioned '.pdf and .exe' only; current implementation is stricter/safer and correctly rejects .exe.
server.py: passing empty full_name/phone returns 400 (good), but Pydantic Form(...) requires presence — completely missing fields return 422 (FastAPI default). Tests accept both.

server.py: uploaded resumes are written to /app/backend/uploads under a uuid filename but never served/downloadable via admin route. Consider exposing a signed-download admin endpoint if HR needs the file.
server.py: ADMIN_PASSWORD stored as plaintext env var and compared with ==. Fine for a single admin bootstrap; consider hashing with bcrypt (which is already imported but unused) for production.
server.py: contact and application handlers await two email sends inline, blocking the response ~seconds when Emergent proxy is slow. Consider BackgroundTasks/fire-and-forget.
seed_data_creation: Created via tests: contact_messages with name 'TEST_Contact User' and 'TEST_UI_Contact_<ts>'; applications with full_name 'TEST_Applicant' and 'TEST_UI_App_<ts>'. Uploaded a tiny valid PDF via multipart. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run backend tests with: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v -o 'addopts=' to bypass xdist parallelism (avoids inter-class ordering issue on contacts test). All 17 tests pass serially. Frontend flows verified via Playwright: landing kinetic hero, About/Privacy/Terms routing, Contact form submit + success toast, Apply Now form submit (with PDF upload via setInputFiles on data-testid=apply-resume-input) + success toast, Admin login wrong->error, correct->/admin dashboard, tab-applications/tab-contacts, Excel export triggers real .xlsx download. Test data persists in MongoDB collections applications and contact_messages.
rca of the issue: No app bugs. Only environmental quirk: pytest xdist parallel workers can split TestContact.test_contact_success from TestAdmin.test_contacts_with_auth across workers, causing the admin check to run before the contact is created. Serial run (-o addopts=) confirms 17/17 pass. Suggested mitigation: keep create+verify in a single class or add a session-scoped seed fixture in conftest.
